testcase.name: billingprintStatementv4
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Bill Posting Failed { "Billing": { "Success": false, "Data": null, "Messages": [ { "Enabled": 1, "Info": "Invalid Batch Id (10001) and bill print active
